name: Create purchaseable part with supplier and manufacturer information
steps:
Given a user with 'create' permission for the Part permission group is logged in and on the Parts view
Given at least one Supplier and one Manufacturer exist in the system
When the user clicks the 'Add Parts' dropdown menu and selects 'Create Part'
When the user enters 'LED Red 3mm' in the 'Part Name' field
When the user checks the 'Purchaseable' checkbox
When the user checks the 'Add Supplier Data' checkbox
When the user selects an existing supplier from the supplier field
When the user enters 'LED-RED-3MM-001' in the supplier part number field
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the part 'LED Red 3mm' is created and the Suppliers tab displays the configured supplier part

name: Supplier options section is visible when creating a Purchaseable part
steps:
Given a user with 'create' permission for the Part permission group is logged in and on the Parts view
When the user clicks the 'Add Parts' dropdown menu and selects 'Create Part'
When the user checks the 'Purchaseable' checkbox in the part creation form
Then the form displays an 'Add Supplier Data' option in the Supplier Options section
